base.life_line_thrive_factor: Data Center AI Accelerator Roadmap Execution (Instinct Platform).

fields.name: report_date
fields.description: The publication date of the equity research report (YYYY-MM-DD).

fields.name: ticker
fields.description: The stock ticker symbol of the company being analyzed.

fields.name: sector
fields.description: The primary industry sector of the company.

fields.name: recommendation
fields.description: The analyst's investment recommendation (e.g., BUY, SELL, HOLD).

fields.name: analyst_classification
fields.description: Professional classification or title of the analyst.

fields.name: fy2025_total_revenue_usd_billion
fields.description: The company's total reported revenue for Fiscal Year 2025 in billions of USD.

fields.name: fy2030_projected_revenue_usd_billion
fields.description: The projected total revenue for Fiscal Year 2030 in billions of USD, a key valuation driver.

fields.name: fy2030_projected_operating_margin_non_gaap
fields.description: The projected Non-GAAP operating margin for Fiscal Year 2030, reflecting profitability expansion (as a decimal).

fields.name: valuation_pe_current_range
fields.description: The current P/E multiple range cited in the report for valuation context.

fields.name: q1_2026_guidance_revenue_usd_billion
fields.description: The Q1 2026 revenue guidance in billions of USD, highlighting recent market sentiment.

fields.name: fy2025_data_center_revenue_usd_billion
fields.description: Revenue from the Data Center segment for Fiscal Year 2025 in billions of USD, reflecting strategic pivot.

fields.name: ai_accelerator_tam_projection_2027_2028_usd_billion
fields.description: The projected Total Addressable Market (TAM) for AI accelerators by 2027/2028 in billions of USD.

fields.name: ai_accelerator_market_capture_assumption_percent
fields.description: The assumed percentage range of the AI accelerator market AMD is expected to capture.

fields.name: meta_partnership_gigawatts
fields.description: The scale of the strategic partnership with Meta Platforms in gigawatts of compute, a key validation of the thesis.

fields.name: economic_moat_rating
fields.description: Analyst's assessment of the company's sustainable competitive advantage.

fields.name: primary_thrive_factor
fields.description: The most critical factor for the company's long-term success or growth thesis.

fields.name: primary_break_condition
fields.description: The most significant risk or condition that could undermine the investment thesis.

fields.name: ceo_stock_price_hurdle_usd
fields.description: The stock price target tied to CEO compensation, indicating internal long-term ambition in USD.

dynamicSchema.notes: This schema captures critical financial figures, strategic growth drivers, key assumptions, and primary risks/moats from the equity research report for Advanced Micro Devices, Inc. (AMD). It balances short-term market catalysts with long-term valuation drivers, adhering to the specified field count and type constraints.

dynamicData.primary_thrive_factor: Data Center AI Accelerator Roadmap Execution (Instinct Platform).
